mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPORT ( SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN) VALUES ( SEQ_SUP_NO.NEXTVAL, #{supCn}, #{supAnsCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{supAnsReg}, #{supAnsRegHm}, #{regNo}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT WHERE sup_no = #{supNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPORT SET SUP_CN = #{supCn}, SUP_ANS_CN = #{supAnsCn}, SUP_ANS_REG = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), SUP_ANS_REG_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), SUP_YN = 'Y' WHERE SUP_NO = #{supNo}
mapper.select: SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_ANS_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT ORDER BY SUP_NO DESC
